name: research
description: Argument anatomy for research work — dissect one or more documents into Gap/Claim/Mechanism/Evidence skeletons, untangle how a set of sources relate (lineage / clusters / contradictions / contested ground, with optional claim-framed positioning), critique a paper adversarially into a referee report (claim↔evidence audit + self-attack), or run a provenance audit over your own documents (trace every load-bearing citation back to a verified source; quarantine the unread). Works on academic papers, technical writeups, competitor analyses, design proposals.
